command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$head=(git rev-parse HEAD).Trim(); $remote=(git rev-parse origin/main).Trim(); if ($head -ne $remote -or $head -ne '322a4431ea30d5663e42876e9150a48399844636') { throw 'push verification failed' }; if (git status --porcelain=v1) { throw 'workspace dirty' }; Write-Output ('PASS pushed_anchor=' + $head)"
